findings.title: 缺少可执行的 Whole-Stage Review Oracle
findings.evidence: P04 only advanced to S00/STAGE_REVIEW_READY_NOT_STARTED; no stage-review evidence or mutation suite existed.
findings.resolution: Add stage0_review_contract.json, stage_review.py, stage review fixtures/tests, deterministic evidence and rollback drill.

findings.title: 仓库双平面 CI 会把 ABD 专用 TaskPack renderer 误判为 Governance 项目
findings.evidence: The existing repository checker discovered ABD by render_human.py and failed because Governance tools are intentionally not copied into ABD.
findings.resolution: Classify all seven registered Governance projects explicitly, classify ABD as a specialized TaskPack project, and fail if any renderer project is omitted from either set.

findings.title: ABD 没有 Ubuntu CI，且仓库治理 workflow 使用浮动 Action 与未锁定 PyYAML
findings.evidence: Phase acceptance contracts require Ubuntu CI, but only local macOS evidence existed before review.
findings.resolution: Add ABD Stage 0 Ubuntu workflow; pin checkout/setup-python/setup-uv by full commit and uv/PyYAML by exact version; require full-history replay and zero-diff evidence regeneration.

findings.title: 原始 FINAL TaskPack ZIP 未进入 Stage 0 可查询来源收据
findings.evidence: P01 bound the supplied Roadmap hash but did not retain the supplied FINAL ZIP digest in a stage-level contract.
findings.resolution: Bind both supplied artifact labels and SHA-256 values while explicitly stating that CI cannot re-open the absent local ZIP.
